content.json:
## Application Gateway Configuration Dashboard

This workbook provides a comprehensive view of all Application Gateways in your Azure subscription, including their configuration and related components.

parameters.name: ResourceGroup
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| summarize by resourceGroup
| order by resourceGroup asc
| project value = resourceGroup, label = resourceGroup, selected = false

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where resourceGroup in ({ResourceGroup})
| extend SKU = properties.sku.name
| extend Tier = properties.sku.tier
| extend Capacity = properties.sku.capacity
| extend AutoscaleMin = properties.autoscaleConfiguration.minCapacity
| extend AutoscaleMax = properties.autoscaleConfiguration.maxCapacity
| extend ProvisioningState = properties.provisioningState
| extend OperationalState = properties.operationalState
| extend PublicIP = array_length(properties.frontendIPConfigurations)
| extend BackendPools = array_length(properties.backendAddressPools)
| extend Listeners = array_length(properties.httpListeners)
| extend Rules = array_length(properties.requestRoutingRules)
| extend HealthProbes = array_length(properties.probes)
| project Name = id, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Location = location, SKU, Tier, Capacity, AutoscaleMin, AutoscaleMax, ProvisioningState, OperationalState, BackendPools, Listeners, Rules, HealthProbes, id
content.title: Application Gateways
content.noDataMessage: No Application Gateways found in the selected subscription(s) and resource group(s)

content.json:
---
### Detailed Configuration

**Selected Application Gateway:** {SelectedAppGatewayName}

Select an Application Gateway from the table above to view detailed configuration.

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
| extend WAFEnabled = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.enabled
| extend WAFMode = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.firewallMode
| extend WAFRuleSetType = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.ruleSetType
| extend WAFRuleSetVersion = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.ruleSetVersion
| extend EnableHTTP2 = properties.enableHttp2
| extend FrontendPorts = array_length(properties.frontendPorts)
| extend SSLCertificates = array_length(properties.sslCertificates)
| extend SSLPolicy = properties.sslPolicy.policyName
| project Configuration = 'General', ['SKU Name'] = properties.sku.name, ['SKU Tier'] = properties.sku.tier, ['SKU Capacity'] = properties.sku.capacity, ['Autoscale Min'] = properties.autoscaleConfiguration.minCapacity, ['Autoscale Max'] = properties.autoscaleConfiguration.maxCapacity
| union (Resources
  | where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
  | where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
  | extend WAFEnabled = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.enabled
  | extend WAFMode = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.firewallMode
  | project Configuration = 'WAF', ['WAF Enabled'] = WAFEnabled, ['WAF Mode'] = WAFMode, ['Rule Set Type'] = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.ruleSetType, ['Rule Set Version'] = properties.webApplicationFirewallConfiguration.ruleSetVersion)
| union (Resources
  | where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
  | where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
  | project Configuration = 'Network', ['HTTP2 Enabled'] = properties.enableHttp2, ['Frontend Ports'] = array_length(properties.frontendPorts), ['SSL Certificates'] = array_length(properties.sslCertificates), ['SSL Policy'] = properties.sslPolicy.policyName)
content.title: Basic Configuration

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
| mv-expand backendPool = properties.backendAddressPools
| extend PoolName = tostring(backendPool.name)
| extend ProvisioningState = tostring(backendPool.properties.provisioningState)
| extend BackendAddresses = backendPool.properties.backendAddresses
| extend BackendIPConfigs = backendPool.properties.backendIPConfigurations
| extend AddressCount = coalesce(array_length(BackendAddresses), 0)
| extend IPConfigCount = coalesce(array_length(BackendIPConfigs), 0)
| mv-expand address = BackendAddresses
| extend FQDN = tostring(address.fqdn)
| extend IPAddress = tostring(address.ipAddress)
| extend Target = coalesce(FQDN, IPAddress, '')
| summarize Targets = make_list(Target) by PoolName, AddressCount, IPConfigCount, ProvisioningState
| extend TargetsDisplay = iff(array_length(Targets) > 0 and Targets[0] != '', strcat_array(Targets, ', '), 'No targets configured')
| project ['Backend Pool'] = PoolName, ['Target Count'] = AddressCount + IPConfigCount, ['Targets'] = TargetsDisplay, ['Provisioning State'] = ProvisioningState
content.title: Backend Address Pools

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
| mv-expand probe = properties.probes
| extend ProbeName = probe.name
| extend Protocol = probe.properties.protocol
| extend Host = probe.properties.host
| extend Path = probe.properties.path
| extend Interval = probe.properties.interval
| extend Timeout = probe.properties.timeout
| extend UnhealthyThreshold = probe.properties.unhealthyThreshold
| extend PickHostNameFromBackend = probe.properties.pickHostNameFromBackendHttpSettings
| extend StatusCodes = probe.properties.match.statusCodes
| extend ProvisioningState = probe.properties.provisioningState
| project ['Health Probe'] = ProbeName, Protocol, Host, Path, ['Interval (s)'] = Interval, ['Timeout (s)'] = Timeout, ['Unhealthy Threshold'] = UnhealthyThreshold, ['Pick Host From Backend'] = PickHostNameFromBackend, ['Valid Status Codes'] = StatusCodes, ['Provisioning State'] = ProvisioningState
content.title: Health Probes

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
| mv-expand listener = properties.httpListeners
| extend ListenerName = listener.name
| extend Protocol = listener.properties.protocol
| extend FrontendPort = split(listener.properties.frontendPort.id, '/')[-1]
| extend HostName = listener.properties.hostName
| extend HostNames = listener.properties.hostNames
| extend RequireServerNameIndication = listener.properties.requireServerNameIndication
| extend SSLCertificate = split(listener.properties.sslCertificate.id, '/')[-1]
| extend ProvisioningState = listener.properties.provisioningState
| project ['Listener'] = ListenerName, Protocol, ['Frontend Port'] = FrontendPort, ['Host Name'] = HostName, ['Host Names'] = HostNames, ['SSL Certificate'] = SSLCertificate, ['Require SNI'] = RequireServerNameIndication, ['Provisioning State'] = ProvisioningState
content.title: HTTP Listeners

content.query:
Resources
| where type == "microsoft.network/applicationgateways"
| where id == "{SelectedAppGateway}"
| mv-expand rule = properties.requestRoutingRules
| extend RuleName = rule.name
| extend RuleType = rule.properties.ruleType
| extend Priority = rule.properties.priority
| extend Listener = split(rule.properties.httpListener.id, '/')[-1]
| extend BackendPool = split(rule.properties.backendAddressPool.id, '/')[-1]
| extend BackendHttpSettings = split(rule.properties.backendHttpSettings.id, '/')[-1]
| extend RedirectConfiguration = split(rule.properties.redirectConfiguration.id, '/')[-1]
| extend URLPathMap = split(rule.properties.urlPathMap.id, '/')[-1]
| extend ProvisioningState = rule.properties.provisioningState
| project ['Rule'] = RuleName, ['Rule Type'] = RuleType, Priority, Listener, ['Backend Pool'] = BackendPool, ['Backend HTTP Settings'] = BackendHttpSettings, ['Redirect Config'] = RedirectConfiguration, ['URL Path Map'] = URLPathMap, ['Provisioning State'] = ProvisioningState
content.title: Request Routing Rules
